zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Lyvelode於大約1432年出生在英國素可布雷德時，她的父親Adam Lavelode28歲，母親Louise de St Remy23歲。她於1450年與Robert Oxenbridge在英國素可布雷德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1494年2月27日在她的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國素可布雷德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Lyvelode于大约1432年出生在英国素可布雷德时，她的父亲Adam Lavelode28岁，母亲Louise de St Remy23岁。她于1450年与Robert Oxenbridge在英国素可布雷德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1494年2月27日在她的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国素可布雷德。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Lyvelode was born about 1432, in Brede, Sussex, England, her father, Adam Lavelode, was 28 and her mother, Louise de St Remy, was 23. She married Robert Oxenbridge in 1450, in Brede, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 27 February 1494, in her hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Brede, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Lyvelode est née environ 1432, à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Adam Lavelode, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Louise de St Remy, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Oxenbridge en 1450, à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 février 1494, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Lyvelode um 1432 in Brede, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Lavelode 28 und ihre Mutter Louise de St Remy 23. Sie hat 1450 in Brede, Sussex, England Robert Oxenbridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Februar 1494 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Brede, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Lyvelode è nata il circa 1432 nel Brede, Sussex, England, sua padre, Adam Lavelode, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Louise de St Remy, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert Oxenbridge nel 1450, nel Brede, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 27 febbraio 1494, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Brede, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Lyvelodeが約1432年にイギリススセックスブレドで生まれた時，父Adam Lavelodeは28歳，母Louise de St Remyは23歳であった。1450年にイギリススセックスブレドでRobert Oxenbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1494年2月27日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリススセックスブレドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Lyvelode(이)가 대략 1432년 영국 수세스 브레드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Lavelode(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Louise de St Remy(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 수세스 브레드에서 Robert Oxenbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 2월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 브레드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Lyvelode nasceu aproximadamente 1432, em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Lavelode, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Louise de St Remy, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Oxenbridge em 1450, em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1494, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Lyvelode родилась около 1432 г. в местности бред, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Lavelode было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise de St Remy, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Oxenbridge в 1450 г. в местности бред, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 27 февраля 1494 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности бред, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Lyvelode nació aproximadamente 1432, en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Lavelode, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Louise de St Remy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert Oxenbridge en 1450, en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1494, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra.
